name: Sweet & Sour Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup sugar, 1 tbsp flour, and 4 tsp dry mustard in the top of a double boiler set over simmering water.
2. In a separate bowl, mix 2 cups cream with 2 egg yolks until combined.
3. Gradually add the cream mixture to the mustard mixture, stirring constantly.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring continuously, until thickened.
5. Gradually stir in the vinegar and continue cooking until the sauce reaches the desired consistency.
